name: Pecan Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Cups Light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, blend together flour, sugar, butter and salt until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Press firmly and evenly into a greased 15x10x1 inch baking pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in another bowl, combine eggs, corn syrup, sugar, butter and vanilla. Stir in pecans. Spread evenly over hot crust.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until set. Cool on a wire rack.
